Interface ICalculator

All Superinterfaces:
Serializable
All Known Subinterfaces:
IAggregateOidCalculator, IEntityCalculator, IHibernateIdGeneratorCalculator, IJDBCCalculator, IModelCalculator, IOptionalCalculator
All Known Implementing Classes:
BigDecimalCalculator, ByPassCalculator, ConcatCalculator, ConcatOidCalculator, CounterByPassOidCalculator, CurrentDateCalculator, CurrentLocalDateCalculator, CurrentMonthCalculator, CurrentTimestampCalculator, CurrentUserBirthDateDayCalculator, CurrentUserBirthDateMonthCalculator, CurrentUserBirthDateYearCalculator, CurrentUserCalculator, CurrentUserEmailCalculator, CurrentUserFamilyNameCalculator, CurrentUserGivenNameCalculator, CurrentUserJobTitleCalculator, CurrentUserMiddleNameCalculator, CurrentUserNickNameCalculator, CurrentYearCalculator, DaysDelayCalculator, DescriptionsCalculator, EmptyStringCalculator, EnumCalculator, FalseCalculator, IdentityCalculator, IntegerCalculator, LongCalculator, ModelPropertyCalculator, NextIntegerCalculator, NextLongCalculator, NullCalculator, NullDateCalculator, SequenceCalculator, StringCalculator, TrueCalculator, UUIDCalculator, ZeroBigDecimalCalculator, ZeroIntegerCalculator, ZeroLongCalculator
public interface ICalculator extends Serializable
Author:
Javier Paniza
